title: IIT Bombay is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IIT Bombay is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!
